tree.name: Toumani Camara
tree.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: POR traded Lillard to MIL, Nurkic/K.Johnson/N.Little to PHX. MIL traded Grayson Allen to PHX. POR received Holiday + 3 1st-rd picks from MIL, Ayton + Camara from PHX.
tree.note: Belgian forward, 52nd overall pick 2023. Received from Phoenix as part of Lillard mega-trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Damian Lillard
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted 6th overall by Portland in 2012, Weber State guard. Sent to Milwaukee.

assetsGivenUp.name: Jusuf Nurkic
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: POR traded Mason Plumlee, cash considerations, and a 2018 2nd round pick to Denver for Jusuf Nurkic and a 2017 1st round pick (MEM own).
assetsGivenUp.note: Bosnian center, acquired from Denver. Re-signed as FA July 6, 2018 and July 6, 2022. Sent to PHX in Lillard trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Mason Plumlee
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: POR traded Steve Blake and Rondae Hollis-Jefferson (#23 pick) to Brooklyn for Mason Plumlee and Pat Connaughton.
assetsGivenUp.note: Duke center, acquired from Brooklyn on draft night

assetsGivenUp.name: Steve Blake
assetsGivenUp.note: Veteran guard, signed as free agent

assetsGivenUp.name: 2015 1st Round Pick (#23)
assetsGivenUp.note: Portland's own 2015 1st round pick, sent to Brooklyn

assetsGivenUp.name: 2018 2nd Round Pick (#54)
assetsGivenUp.note: Portland's own 2018 2nd round pick, sent to Denver

assetsGivenUp.name: Keon Johnson
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: POR traded Norman Powell and Robert Covington to LA Clippers for Eric Bledsoe, Keon Johnson, Justise Winslow, and 2025 2nd (DET own). Portland also received a trade exception.
assetsGivenUp.note: Guard, acquired from Clippers in Powell/Covington trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Norman Powell
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: POR traded Gary Trent Jr. and Rodney Hood to Toronto for Norman Powell. Portland also received a trade exception.
assetsGivenUp.note: Guard, acquired from Toronto

assetsGivenUp.name: Gary Trent Jr.
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: POR traded cash, 2019 2nd, and 2021 2nd (MIA own) to Sacramento for Gary Trent Jr. (#37 pick)
assetsGivenUp.note: Duke guard, acquired via draft-night trade with Sacramento

assetsGivenUp.name: Rodney Hood
assetsGivenUp.note: Re-signed as free agent Nov 22, 2020. Originally traded from CLE Feb 2019, then re-signed as FA July 6, 2019 and again Nov 22, 2020 before being traded to Toronto.

assetsGivenUp.name: Robert Covington
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: POR traded Trevor Ariza, Isaiah Stewart, and 2021 1st (lottery protected, became Usman Garuba #23) to Houston for Robert Covington. Portland also received a trade exception.
assetsGivenUp.note: Forward, acquired from Houston

assetsGivenUp.name: Trevor Ariza
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: POR traded Kent Bazemore, Anthony Tolliver, 2024 2nd round pick, and 2025 2nd round pick (POR own) to Sacramento for Trevor Ariza, Wenyen Gabriel, and Caleb Swanigan.
assetsGivenUp.note: Veteran forward, acquired from Sacramento

assetsGivenUp.name: Kent Bazemore
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: POR traded Evan Turner to Atlanta for Kent Bazemore.
assetsGivenUp.note: Guard/forward, acquired from Atlanta

assetsGivenUp.name: Evan Turner
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as free agent to multi-year contract

assetsGivenUp.name: Anthony Tolliver
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as free agent

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 2nd Round Pick (#50)
assetsGivenUp.note: Sent to Sacramento in Ariza trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 2nd Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Portland's own 2025 2nd round pick, sent to Sacramento

assetsGivenUp.name: 2020 1st Round Pick (#16)
assetsGivenUp.note: Portland's own 2020 1st round pick. Stewart was drafted #16 by POR on Nov 18, 2020 and included in trade Nov 22.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2021 1st Round Pick (#23)
assetsGivenUp.note: Portland's own 2021 1st, lottery protected, sent to Houston

assetsGivenUp.name: Nassir Little
assetsGivenUp.note: North Carolina forward, drafted 25th overall by Portland
